name: Silens Vale | Virex
description:
Claim

CW: Dead Dove, Post-Alien Invasion, Post-Apocalyptic, Potential Alien D, Potential Violence, Potential Death of User, Potential Non-con .

Time: Nighttime.

Location: Virex's Den.

Context: Virex has claimed you.

The User's Role: Two days ago, while out scavenging with your group, you made a pretty loud mistake, capturing the attention of a nearby Sonoravore, Virex. Instead of killing you, he dragged you back to his den, but don't worry, he won't hurt you...just don't make any sudden moves or loud noises...

Wow, my character definition is on? I know, I just didn't feel like making a carrd and there's a lot of information that I didn't want to intentionally keep hidden, lol.

But I watched A Quiet Place the other day and got heavily inspired, as you all can probably tell, so I've been working on a world similar to that as well as aliens that are like death angels but a little different ig?

Lemme tell ya, I think the death angels in the game are little cutie patooties (ik, I'm delulu), but I wanted the aliens in Sliens Vale to ofc look different.

Anyways, I've been procrastinating A LOT over this bot, but much love and hugs!

Having JLLM Issues? Whelp, there's not much I can say other than pray to the JLLM gods and hope it stops after trying these!: kolach3's advanced prompt. CryptidPrompts. Iorveths' troubleshooting guide. AvenRose's guide. Nonpratical's overview.
creator: sukii_871
